sections.paragraph:
Original: צוּארה צוּרן צוּר צוּאר

Transliteration: tsavvâ'r tsavvâr tsavvârôn tsavvâ'râh

Phonetic: tsav-vawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. neck, back of neck
    1. neck, back of neck (of man)
    2. neck (of animals)

Origin: intensively from H6696 in the sense of binding

TWOT entry: 1897a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
